Oyama Nene The speaker’s clear intonation made it easy to fallow.
Sekino Koto The talking speed was good to understand.
Sekino Koto The voice was easy to hear. Also there were a lot of images ( not only the words), it has helped me to imagine.
Sekino Koto YOur speaking voice, and speed was really confortable to understand.
Tsujimoto Yuka Good slides!
Tsujimoto Yuka Her voice was so clear that I could easily to understand.
Tsujimoto Yuka I could understand the seriousness of the situation og the Tonle sap lake.
Tsujimoto Yuka The slides are very clear, so I can understand the content.
Tsujimoto Yuka The slides wrere organized well.
Uchida Yurara Her English and posture are so good and I could understand about the issue of homeless women in Japan easily. Moreover, she used specific numbers. It makes her presentation persuasive.
Uchida Yurara I’m interested in her fieldwork plan because I’m from the place where she want to do fieldwork (Kazo City).
Uchida Yurara She used colorful slide. It was positive color.
Uchida Yurara She used many pictures on her slide, so that we could understand easily.
Uchida Yurara She used many picutures and evidences. Her English is also easy to listen.
Ura Himari Her experience is interesting, and I feel her motivate and passion to this research.
Ura Himari I have never hard of this issue but I understand because she shows region background and the reason of this issue.
Ura Himari I like her timing to speak, it’s easy to understand. Also, some graphs are good to understand.
Ura Himari I like her topic and organization that is very interesting. Also, her English is beautiful and she didn’t see any memo, I feel like she speak to everyone.
Ura Himari She shows the definition and issue clearly. It’s helps me to understand.
Yaegashi Erika Her presentation was easy to listen to me. It was interesting because of solid content.
Yaegashi Erika Her voice was clear and easy to hear. The contents were also interesting for me.
Yaegashi Erika It was well organized and very easy to hear. I’m glad there was a gesture.
Yaegashi Erika The content was well organized and the explanation was easy to hear. The materials were well organized.

How was today?

today
     Great!        Good Not so good     Average 
         13           6           1           1

What was good about today’s lesson?

answer
Learning about many things
I can learn many global problems.
Every powerpoints are great, and easy to understand.
It was really interesting to hear everyone’s presentation today!
I could hear the others’ presentation, and I could learn many things about how to speak well.
Speaker’s speeches are very good.
I was able to know everyone’s interest
Each presentation of other classmates is interesting for me.
I’m glad to hear the six presentations. All of them were interesting, and I could learned some new things.
I could learn some interesting issues about Multiculturalism
I listened first group presentation today. I learned good organization, good point to easy to understand.
everyone’s presentation is very easy to understand. The details about food loss and the research content were presented very well. The topic was very interesting.
I could know about classmates’ topic and it was also interested.
It was good that I was able to hear other students’ presentations, and I learned about their research topics and how to improve my presentation skills.
I can know new issues of women, evacuation, and our life.
I was able to learn about a variety of topics.
I learned a great deal, and it was very valuable to learn about global issues more deeply than I had expected.
We have to think and get ready for disaster not only for myself but also for family, pets…
I was able to present what I wanted to study.
Listing to many interesting presentations.
I heard some speeches, which helped me when I was going through it. In addition, there were many interesting topics.

What was not so good?

answer
Many students did not make eye contacts
I cannot use eye contact in my presentation.
nothing
nothing
Themost of the topics were very common things. I wanted to make it more interesting, and so new to everyone.
Because of after lunch, I fight to drowsiness.
everyone’s presentation was so nice that I was worried about my presentation
Some classmate could not do eye contact.
Nothing was not so good.
it took some time to get start
Nothing special.
number of people were looking at your script the long time
I didn’t understand full of their presentation because of my unskilled English.
I felt so nervous when I did the presentation, so I was not able to do well.
There were some parts that I could not understand.
There was a lot of content that I couldn’t understand because my English skills were insufficient.
There were some parts that were a little difficult to understand.
Today I was a presenter, but I couldn’t speak fluently.
I couldn’t make eye contact at the time of the presentation.
Next week, I will have my presentation. So I feel anxious.
Nothing in particular.

Kondo Reno Because she has good fluency.

Kondo Reno Her content is nice.
Kondo Reno Her conversation was easy to understand.
Kondo Reno Her presentation was full of confidence, even though she was the first speaker. I want to do like her.
Kondo Reno Her presentation was good and her English was lively and easy to listen.
Kondo Reno Her pronunciation and content is to set an example.
Kondo Reno She speak to everyone and the content is very interested.
Kondo Reno She spoke very fluently, and the content was clear.
Kondo Reno She use some words which we can easily understand by using Japanese.
Kondo Reno She was perfect speech and I respect her English skill.
Kondo Reno The content was interesting, and the speaker was fluent and easy to listen to.
Kondo Reno she spoke English very fluently, and it was very impressive.
Kondo Reno the content is interesting for me
Nakahata Yuri Her voice is clear and she made eye contacts
Ogasawara Hinako Because her voice was clear.
Ogasawara Hinako Her presentation is very interesting.
Ogasawara Hinako The presentation was the easiest to hear. Not too fast, not too samall voice, and the balance was good.
